name: Nurse in Midvale with back issues from lifting patients—occupational illness?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if directly from patient handling duties.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah covers musculoskeletal from work duties like patient lifting.[1][4] Proven work result.[3] Key factors: Repetitive strain proof; medical records; job description.[1] Report promptly, file claim. Common for healthcare—attorney boosts approval.
